mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_name, email, password, age, created_at, deleted_at, updated_at FROM USERS WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT r.role_name FROM ROLE r JOIN USER_ROLE ur ON ur.role_id = r.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT fl.role FROM LINE l JOIN FAMILY_LINE fl ON fl.line_id = l.line_id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.is_main = TRUE LIMIT 1
SELECT l.line_id FROM LINE l WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.is_main = TRUE LIMIT 1
